text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 25 

EM_BENE_PMT 

LABEL: Evaluation and Management (E/M) Beneficiary Payments 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the sum of coinsurance and deductible payments for the Part B evaluation and 
management (E/M) services for a given year. The total Beneficiary payments are calculated as the sum 
of LINE_COINSRNC_AMT + LINE_BENE_PTB_DDCTBL_AMT for the relevant lines.
